title: thelypteris juruensis
intro: Thelypteris juruensis, also known as the Juru fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America, specifically in countries such as Ecuador and Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant, making it beneficial for health issues such as bronchitis, fever, and digestive problems. The leaves of the Juru fern can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
